1000664335.english: Ah, well, yes! First, I need to prepare thoroughly...... *Yawn*......
1000664335.korean: 아, 그게, 네! 일단 빈틈없이 준비를...... 후아암......

1000664336.english: Leaving a faint trace of her aura on her face, she suddenly strikes with that unexpected combination of innocence and clumsiness I never would have expected... That destructive power...
1000664336.korean: 얼굴에 어렴풋이 그분의 분위기를 남겨두고서 설마 했던 순둥이&덜렁이 속성으로 훅 치고 들어오는 이 의외성...... 이 파괴력......

1000664337.english: Hey, you really exist, right? It's not all just my delusion, is it!?
1000664337.korean: 저기, 너 진짜 존재하는 거 맞지? 전부 내 망상인 건 아니지!?

1000664339.english: Ah, you know that guy. She's always contemplating the truths of the universe; that's philosophy. So even if she occasionally spouts nonsense you can't understand, just leave her alone.
1000664339.korean: 아~ 그 녀석 말이야, 언제나 우주의 진리를 고찰하고 있거든, 철학이란 거야. 그러니 가끔 의미를 알 수 없는 말을 해대도 그냥 내버려 둬.

1000664341.english: ......Well, I'll be right back after helping Silky over there for a moment!
1000664341.korean: ......그게, 저 잠깐 저쪽에서 실키 씨를 도와드리고 올게요!

1000664342.english: Hmm, I guess it’s hard to fit in after all. With our vibe.
1000664342.korean: 으음, 역시 어울리기 힘든 걸까. 우리 분위기에.

1000664343.english: Wouldn't it go well together later? Even the simulator moved accurately when I did it calmly.
1000664343.korean: 나중엔 잘 어울리지 않겠어? 시뮬레이터도 침착하게 했을 땐 정확하게 움직였으니까.

1000664344.english: But then why did the score end up being such a mess......
1000664344.korean: 하지만 그러면 왜 점수가 그렇게 엉망이 돼버리는 건데......

1000664345.english: As for the timing of Kheshig's mistake, it is as consistent as breathing. It is when you get hit by a bullet.
1000664345.korean: 케시크가 실수하는 타이밍 말인데, 호흡하는 것처럼 일정해. 네가 탄환을 맞았을 때야.

1000664346.english: Ah, come to think of it.

1000664347.english: That guy is ridiculously weak to the stress of her allies possibly taking damage.
1000664347.korean: 저 녀석은 아군이 데미지를 입을지도 모른다는 스트레스에 터무니 없이 약해.

1000664348.english: Well, it would be fine in a real battle, though. Since the captain is the one leading the charge, not you, you'll soon realize there's no way you'll get hit by a bullet.
1000664348.korean: 뭐 실전이라면 괜찮지만 말이지. 선두에 서는 게 네가 아니라 대장이니까. 탄환 따위 맞을 리가 없다는 걸 곧 알게 될 거야.

1000664349.english: But listen—isn't it a bit much that that's her 'initial setting'? Of all things, she has to be a medic. It's the position where she has to see her comrades' wounds the most.
1000664349.korean: 그런데 말이야- , 그게 성격의 ‘초기 설정’이라니 좀 그렇지 않아? 하필이면 위생병이라고. 가장 동료의 상처를 봐야만 하는 포지션이잖아.

1000664350.english: ...You see, I am grateful for the circumstances itself, that it was created in this way.
1000664350.korean: ...난 말이지, ‘이런 식으로 만들어졌다’라는 경위 자체에는 감사하고 있어.

1000664351.english: After all, it is thanks to this temperament that I have been able to make it through the chaos up to this day.
1000664351.korean: 이러니저러니 해도 이런 기질 덕에 오늘까지 수라장을 뚫고 올 수 있었으니까.

1000664352.english: But thanks to that amazing human who designed Kheshig, I’ve been in a bad mood for the first time in a while. That mental preset was made on the premise that it would be ground down from the very beginning.
1000664352.korean: 하지만 케시크를 설계한 대단하신 인간님 때문에 오랜만에 기분이 더러워졌어. 저 멘탈 프리셋, 처음부터 갈려 나가는 걸 전제로 만든 거잖아.

1000664353.english: Well, I can't even imagine what the Allied War era was like... Wait, hey Feather, where are you going?
1000664353.korean: 뭐, 연합전쟁 시절이 어땠을지는 상상도 안 가지만...... 잠깐, 이봐 페더, 어디 가려고?

1000664354.english: Huh? Then you mean to tell me to do it here? In front of everyone?
1000664354.korean: 에? 그럼 설마 여기서 하라구요? 모두가 보는 앞에서?

1000664355.english: Ah, seriously! Enough already, just hurry up and do it under the shade of that tree! If you drag this out until later, I won't be able to handle it.
1000664355.korean: 아~ 진짜~ 됐으니까 거기 나무 그늘에서 빨리해버려! 나중까지 질질 끌고 갔다간 감당 안 되니까.

1000664357.english: Will I really be able to get used to this? In a unit like this......
1000664357.korean: 진짜 익숙해질 수 있을까? 이런 부대에......

1000664358.english: Huh? Is that okay? You get in trouble if you open Horde gear without permission...
1000664358.korean: 에? 괜찮나요? 호드 쪽 장비는 멋대로 개봉하면 혼나는데......

1000664359.english: Don't worry! Managing the Horde's logistics is my responsibility. Oh, sorry for the late introduction. My name is Kheshig. I look forward to working with you.
1000664359.korean: 걱정마세요! 호드 부대의 병참 관리는 제 역할이니까요. 아, 인사가 늦었네요. 저는 케시크라고 합니다. 앞으로 잘 부탁드립니다.

1000664360.english: I'm Steel Line Silky. Hehe, is this Horde's support unit? Well, I had the impression that it was a unit made up of unique people in many ways, but it seems like Kheshig isn't like that.
1000664360.korean: 스틸라인 실키입니다. 헤헤, 호드의 지원기인가요~ 뭐랄까, 여러모로 특이한 사람이 모인 부대라는 인상이었는데, 케시크 씨는 그렇지 않은 거 같네요.

1000664361.english: Ah, so that's the feeling I get even from inside the Orca, right now regarding the Horde......
1000664361.korean: 아~, 역시 오르카호 안에서 봐도 그런 느낌인가요, 지금 호드는......

1000664362.english: No, no. If you get to know them, they are all bright and kind people. Then, I will leave the equipment here.
1000664362.korean: 아뇨 아뇨, 알고 보면 모두 밝고 상냥한 사람들이에요. 그럼 장비는 여기에 두겠습니다.

1000664363.english: Yes, I received it. Thank you for your hard work!

1000664364.english: ......Alright then. There isn't much time left before sortie, so I should hurry and check.
1000664364.korean: ......자, 그럼. 출격 시간도 별로 안 남았으니, 서둘러 확인해야지.

1000664365.english: Mr. Camel's 180mm cannon, no problem...... A bayonet on an HK2070 pistol, I don't know what she was thinking, but yeah, no problem with the operation......
1000664365.korean: 카멜 씨의 180mm포, 문제없음...... HK2070 권총에 총검이라니, 무슨 생각인지 모르겠지만 응, 동작에는 문제없음......

1000664366.english: Mr. Salamander's Burning Walker...... Hydraulics, fuel, everything is OK...... This thing has been modified tremendously. Just like the Doctor, Orca really is full of genius mechanics......
1000664366.korean: 샐러맨더 씨의 버닝 워커...... 유압, 연료, 전부 Ok...... 뭔가 엄청나게 개조 돼있네 이거. 닥터 씨도 그렇지만, 오르카에는 정말 천재 메카닉이 모여 있구나......

1000664367.english: This belt over here belongs to Mr. Talonfeather...... But what are these numbers on the recording media? All the data should be transmitted directly to the Orca, so is this being recorded for some other purpose?
1000664367.korean: 이쪽 탄띠는 탈론페더 씨 거네...... 근데 이 기록 미디어 숫자는 뭐지? 데이터는 전부 오르카에 직접 전송될 텐데, 뭔가 다른 용도로 찍는 게 있는 걸까?

1000664368.english: And this is...... a revolver cannon? What is this? I've never seen it before... Ah, I see. I guess this is Captain Khan's weapon.
1000664368.korean: 그리고 이거는...... 리볼버 캐논? 뭐지 이거, 처음 보는데... 아아 그렇구나, 이게 칸 대장님 무기인가 보네.

1000664369.english: Manual loading and no optical sights? Huh? Is this really a modern weapon? This huge bayonet is practically a spear... There's no balance or anything. Can you actually aim and shoot to hit anything?
1000664369.korean: 수동 장전에 광학 조준기도 없어? 엥? 이거 정말 현대 병기 맞아? 이런 커다란 총검, 거의 창이나 마찬가지잖아...... 밸런스고 뭐고 없고. 진짜 조준하고 쏴서 맞출 순 있는 거야?

1000664370.english: Ah, let's stop, stop, I need to stop the distracting thoughts and get to work...... Mod.101 Linked Grenade......
1000664370.korean: 아아, 그만하자, 그만, 잡생각 그만하고 일해야지...... Mod.101연결척탄......

1000664371.english: Huh? Did you increase the amount of explosives? And the detonator isn't a ready-made one either... Wow, that's dangerous. Mr. Hyena, did you really throw something like this?
1000664371.korean: 에? 이거 작약 양을 늘렸어? 뇌관도 기성품이 아니고......우와, 위험해라, 하이에나 씨 이런 걸 던졌던 거야?

1000664373.english: Huh? Yes, we are sortieing soon, so please check your equipment...
1000664373.korean: 어? 네, 곧 출격이니 여러분의 장비 점검을...

1000664374.english: Did you touch my bomb? Just because you wanted to?

1000664375.english: Ha, but logistics management is my role...
1000664375.korean: 하, 하지만 병참 관리는 제 역할이라...

1000664376.english: I don't know if it's logistics or whatever, but in Orca's Horde, the rule is never to touch another person's weapon. Didn't you hear that?
1000664376.korean: 병참인지 뭔지는 모르겠고, 오르카의 호드에서는 다른 사람 무기는 절대 만지지 않는 게 규칙이야. 못 들었어?

1000664378.english: Hey, what's all the commotion? ......Oh, right. Should I have explained that first?
1000664378.korean: 이봐, 웬 소란이야? ......아차, 그렇지. 그것부터 설명해야 했나.

1000664379.english: Hey Kheshig, we each adjust our gear to what we consider to be the best state. You could say we're more sensitive about our weapons than the stuff inside our underwear...
1000664379.korean: 저기 케시크, 우리는 각자 자기 장비를 베스트라고 생각하는 상태로 조정하거든. 서로 무기에 대해서는 팬티 속 물건보다 민감하다고 할까....

1000664381.english: It might be different from 100 years ago, but we have our current way of doing things, and it works well.
1000664381.korean: 100년 전과는 다르겠지만, 지금 우리에겐 지금의 방식이 있고 그걸로 잘 돌아가고 있어.

1000664382.english: I won't tell you to adapt right away, so could you be a little careful until you get used to it?
1000664382.korean: 빨리 적응하라고는 하지 않을 테니 익숙해질 때까진 조금 조심해주겠어?

1000664384.english: Everyone, it's time to sortie. Are you ready?

1000664385.english: Now, hurry up. You absolutely cannot be late.
1000664385.korean: 자, 서둘러. 지각은 절대 해선 안 되니까.

1000664387.english: Nothing special. The Iron Bugs around here.

1000664389.english: It seems too weak, doesn't it?

1000664390.english: Feather, what worries you in the air?

1000664391.english: No, I don't see anything. The enemy I just dealt with also seems like an isolated scout unit.
1000664391.korean: 아뇨, 아무것도 보이지 않아요. 방금 처리한 적도 고립된 척후 부대 같아요.

1000664392.english: But the commander told me to be careful because the area around here is enemy territory.
1000664392.korean: 하지만 사령관 얘기로는 이 부근부터는 적의 세력권이니 조심하라던데.

1000664394.english: That might be true. But we can't draw a conclusion based on hunch alone. Our reconnaissance mission is to gather concrete evidence and bring it to Marie.
1000664394.korean: 그럴지도. 하지만 예감만으로는 결론을 낼 수 없지. 확실한 증거를 잡고 마리에게 가져가는 게 우리 정찰 임무다.

1000664397.english: From here on, increase your movement speed. Be prepared to respond immediately no matter what happens.
1000664397.korean: 여기서부턴 이동 속도를 올린다. 무슨 일이 있더라도 바로 대응할 수 있도록 각오해 둬라.

1000664400.english: Yes. Khan is currently leading the Horde forces on a scouting mission. I expect she will complete her assigned mission and return soon.
1000664400.korean: 네. 현재 칸이 앞장서 호드 부대를 이끌고 척후 진행 중입니다. 곧 정해진 임무를 완료하고, 귀환하리라 생각됩니다.

1000664401.english: - According to Marie's report, there appear to be no problems. But why? A sense of unease is creeping in......
1000664401.korean: - 마리의 보고 상으로는 아무 문제도 없어 보인다. 하지만 왜일까? 불안감이 엄습해 온다......

1000664402.english: - I am worried because it is Keshik's first sortie, but I also feel like that is not the only thing.
1000664402.korean: - 케시크의 첫 출진이라 걱정되기도 하지만 그것만이 아닌 기분이 든다.

1000664403.english: ...Do you think it is going too smoothly?

1000664404.english: - That’s Marie for you. Just by me keeping my mouth shut for a moment, she managed to figure out what I was thinking.
1000664404.korean: - 역시 마리. 내가 살짝 입을 다문 것만으로도 속마음을 알아챌 줄이야.

1000664405.english: - Just as Marie quietly nodded in response to my unspoken order, Hraesvelgr, who was on aerial patrol, suddenly looked alarmed and sent a message.
1000664405.korean: - 두말할 필요도 없는 나의 지시에 마리가 조용히 고개를 끄덕였을 때, 상공 초계를 맡은 흐레스벨그가 안색을 바꾸고 통신을 보내왔다.

1000664406.english: P-Commander! This is a disaster! Fierce jamming! It is being transmitted over a wide area never seen before!
1000664406.korean: 사, 사령관님! 큰일입니다! 맹렬한 전파방해가! 지금까지 본 적 없는 광범위로 발신되고 있어요!

1000664408.english: At this rate, communication with the advance Horde unit will be cut off! Issue the return order immediately!
1000664408.korean: 이대로는 앞선 호드 부대와의 통신이 끊깁니다! 서둘러 귀환 명령을!

1000664409.english: - Panicked, I call out to Khan via radio, but there is no response. Only empty noise returns......
1000664409.korean: - 당황하며 무선으로 칸을 부르지만, 응답이 없다. 공허한 노이즈가 돌아올 뿐이다......

1000664410.english: I've shaken off the pursuit for now......

1000664411.english: However, this entire area is also surrounded. It is only a matter of time before this place is discovered.
1000664411.korean: 하지만 이 근처 일대도 포위됐어요. 여기가 발견되는 것도 시간문제예요.

1000664412.english: And... as soon as the Iron Bug dropped their camouflage, intense radio jamming spread, and communication with the main force was already cut off.
1000664412.korean: 그리고...... 철충들이 의태를 푼 동시에 강렬한 전파 방해가 펼쳐졌고, 이미 본대와의 통신도 끊겼어요.

1000664413.english: So you're saying I can't even ask for help.

1000664414.english: They intended to isolate us from the start.

1000664415.english: He's pretty quick-witted for an Iron Bug.

1000664418.english: Hehe, sorry. I think I took a big hit......
1000664418.korean: 헤헤, 미안. 큰 거 한 방 먹어 버렸나 봐......

1000664420.english: (It's dangerous, I can't move at all with this wound......)

1000664421.english: (Since the radio is dead, I have no choice but to go call for reinforcements in person. Fortunately, the enemy hasn't located this spot yet.)
1000664421.korean: (무선이 먹통인 이상 직접 구원을 부르러 갈 수밖에 없군. 다행히 지금 이 장소는 적이 파악하지 못했어.)

1000664422.english: Don't worry about it, just go ahead. I'll take care of the cleanup......
1000664422.korean: 신경 쓰지 말고 먼저 가. 뒤처리는 내가 알아서......

1000664423.english: Don't talk nonsense! I would never leave you behind!
1000664423.korean: 바보 같은 말 하지 마세요! 절대로 두고 가지 않아요!

1000664424.english: Kheshig, stay here with the hyenas.

1000664426.english: Splitting into two sides, one for heaven and one for earth, they break through the enemy encirclement. The side that escapes first joins the main force to request reinforcements.
1000664426.korean: 하늘과 땅, 양쪽으로 갈려서 적의 포위를 돌파한다. 먼저 탈출한 쪽이 본대와 합류해서 구원을 요청한다.

1000664427.english: Feder, you go alone. Don't force a breakthrough; just distract the gaze from above. We will exploit that gap from the ground.
1000664427.korean: 페더, 너는 혼자 가라. 무리해서 돌파하려 하지 말고 상공의 시선을 교란하면 돼. 우리는 지상에서 그 틈을 찌른다.

1000664429.english: Kheshig, guard the hyenas here until the rescue arrives. You can do it, right?
1000664429.korean: 케시크는 구조가 올 때까지 여기서 하이에나를 지켜라. 할 수 있겠지?

1000664431.english: Yes! I will make it happen. Absolutely!

1000664432.english: No, I think that would be difficult.

1000664434.english: Boss, that method makes for a sloppy finish. You need to mix in one more trick.
1000664434.korean: 대장, 그 방법으론 마무리가 어설퍼. 거기다 하나 더 속임수를 섞어 놔야지.

1000664435.english: First, I'll have my Burning Walker run on full auto to draw the enemy's attention. In the meantime, the Captain and Feather escape in the opposite direction.
1000664435.korean: 우선 내 버닝 워커를 풀 오토로 달리게 해서 적의 주의를 끌게. 그 틈에 대장과 페더는 반대 방향으로 빠져나가.

1000664437.english: I’m really giving you a big treat. Believe it or not, this is a baby I customized with all my heart, you know? Let it be decorated with spectacular fireworks.
1000664437.korean: 큰맘 먹고 선심 쓰는 거야. 이래 봬도 정성껏 커스터마이즈 한 베이비라구? 화려한 불꽃놀이로 장식되게 해줘.

1000664439.english: Well, since my legs are gone, we won't be able to run together.
1000664439.korean: 뭐 다리가 사라지니 같이 뜀박질은 할 수 없겠고.

1000664440.english: We should help nurse the wounded here. I'll keep an eye on Kheshig so she doesn't get bitten by a hyena.
1000664440.korean: 여기서 부상자 간병이나 같이 해야지. 케시크가 하이에나에게 물리지 않도록 감시할게.

1000664441.english: Alright. Camel and Werewolf, follow me.

1000664443.english: I'll leave the rear to you, Kheshig.

1000664445.english: Wait, you didn't say a word to me?

1000664446.english: Oh, right. Kheshig, watch out if that gambling addict suggests doing something weird just because she has some free time. Those dice are rigged.
1000664446.korean: 아, 맞다. 케시크, 저 도박마가 한가하답시고 이상한 거 하자고 하면 조심해. 저 녀석 주사위, 사기 주사위거든.

1000664447.english: I, I'll devote myself to taking care of Mr. Hyena!
1000664447.korean: 저, 저는 하이에나 씨 돌보는 데 전념할게요!

1000664448.english: ......You're really cute. You shouldn't bully it, Salamander.

1000664449.english: I said I got it. Now, hurry up and go.

1000664450.english: Don't be hasty, even a hyena. They will definitely call for rescue.
1000664450.korean: 하이에나도 성급한 생각 마. 반드시 구조를 불러올 테니까.

1000664452.english: To be continued in Part 2 of <Fangs of Fury>.

1000664453.english: Hey! Where did those guys just come from? Feather!?
1000664453.korean: 이봐! 지금 녀석들이 어디서 튀어나온 거야? 페더!?

1000664454.english: I don't know! There was no reaction from either the radar or the infrared until just now!
1000664454.korean: 모르겠어요! 방금까지 레이더도 적외선도 아무런 반응 없었는데!

1000664455.english: ......These guys are specialized in mimicry. I guess it was a trap after all.

1000664456.english: So, does that mean this area is already swarming with enemies?
1000664456.korean: 그럼 이미 이 부근은 적 천지라는 건가요?

1000664457.english: We bite into the trap whole. That's our way.
1000664457.korean: 함정은 통째로 물어 뜯는다. 그게 우리 방식이지.

1000664458.english: Escape faster than the enemy. Remember your regular training.
1000664458.korean: 적보다 빠르게 빠져나간다. 평소 훈련을 떠올리도록.

1000664461.english: (......Everyone is worried about me...... I see, I'm holding them back so they can't move at their usual speed......)
1000664461.korean: (......모두, 나를 신경 쓰고 있어...... 그렇구나, 내가 발목을 잡아서 평소 속도대로 움직일 수 없구나......)

1000664462.english: (Disintegration...... I'm nothing but a burden here......)

1000664463.english: (At this rate, I don't know what I'm here for......)

1000664464.english: It has sufficient performance as a support machine...

1000664466.english: Besides the Kheshig model data, are there any materials worth recovering from the Black River facility?
1000664466.korean: 케시크 모델 데이터 외에, 블랙리버 시설에서 회수할 만한 자재는 있어?

1000664467.english: In that case, it is definitely worth targeting.

1000664469.english: I'll allow it. Everyone, get along well.

1000664472.english: Is that the usual future prediction?

1000664473.english: So, has everything been going smoothly so far?

1000664474.english: Don't let your guard down. Everyone, stand by in a state of readiness for battle.
1000664474.korean: 방심은 금물이야. 모두 임전 태세로 대기하도록.

1000664475.english: May I be frank? Actually, I've been waiting for this day all along.&nI thought it wouldn't matter how long it took...&nYou’ll pay dearly for making me wait, Commander. In my own way.
1000664475.korean: 저... 솔직히 말씀드려도 될까요? 사실, 이날이 오기만을 줄곧 기다리고 있었어요.&n얼마나 오래 걸리더라도 상관없을 거라 생각했는데...&n기다리게 한 대가는 톡톡히 받아낼 거예요, 사령관님? 저만의 방식으로요.

1000664476.english: - According to Alpha and Armand's report, the need for additional law enforcement has increased due to refugee integration, reinforcement of unit members, and establishment of a base.
1000664476.korean: - 알파와 아르망의 보고에 따르자면 난민의 합류와 부대원 증원, 거점의 조성으로 인해 치안인력 확충의 필요성이 증대되었다고 한다.

1000664477.english: - Quantitative increase alone is insufficient; new personnel must be managed as well.
1000664477.korean: - 인력의 양적 증가만으로는 부족하고 이를 관리할 새로운 인력까지.

1000664478.english: - While investigating the ark for solutions, information on a new Bioroid called Yurine's Sonia was found.
1000664478.korean: - 문제 해결을 위해 방주를 뒤지다가 유린의 소니아라는 새로운 바이오로이드의 정보를 찾았다.

1000664479.english: - Historical records describe her as a versatile police officer.
1000664479.korean: - 옛 시대의 자료에선 다방면으로 활약한 경찰이라고 한다.

1000664480.english: - Since Alpha and Armand did not oppose, it was decided to restore her.
1000664480.korean: - 알파와 아르망도 반대하지 않았기에 복원하기로 결정.

1000664481.english: - Coincidentally, the completion of Sonia's restoration overlaps with my originally scheduled but canceled time, so I will personally meet her and guide her through the base.
1000664481.korean: - 마침 소니아 복원이 완료되는 시간과 원래 내 일정이 있다가 취소된 시간이 겹치기에 그녀를 직접 만나 거점을 안내해주기로 했다.

1000664482.english: - Waiting briefly in the restoration lobby, a Bioroid approached me.
1000664482.korean: - 복원소 로비에서 잠시 기다리고 있으니 한 바이오로이드가 나에게 다가왔다.

1000664483.english: Nice to meet you, Commander. I am Inspector Yurine's Sonia of the City Guard. Please feel free to call me Sonia.
1000664483.korean: 처음 뵙겠습니다, 사령관님. 시티 가드 소속 유린의 소니아 경정입니다. 편하게 소니아라 불러주십시오.

1000664484.english: I have already been briefed on the current situation.

1000664485.english: Although this period is harsher than the era in which I was developed, I will do my best to adapt quickly and perform effectively.
1000664485.korean: 제가 개발된 시대보다 더 험난한 시기지만 최대한 빨리 적응하여 활약할 수 있도록 노력하겠습니다.

1000664486.english: - Sonia's rigid and businesslike attitude caused me a bit of concern.
1000664486.korean: - 소니아의 딱딱하고 사무적인 태도에 조금 걱정이 되었다.

1000664487.english: - According to members who have experience from the old era or other groups, Orca has a free and relaxed atmosphere.
1000664487.korean: - 옛 시대 혹은 다른 집단을 경험한 적이 있는 대원들의 말에 따르자면 오르카는 자유롭고 느긋한 분위기라고 했다.

1000664488.english: - This atmosphere has rarely caused major problems, but judging by Sonia's attitude, it might seem irritating to her.
1000664488.korean: - 이런 분위기로 크게 문제가 된 적은 없었지만 소니아의 태도로 봐서 그녀에게는 이 분위기가 고깝게 보일지도 몰랐다.

1000664489.english: - I decided to not only guide Sonia around the base but also explain Orca's atmosphere to her.
1000664489.korean: - 소니아에게는 거점의 안내뿐만 아니라 오르카의 분위기도 설명해주자고 마음먹었다.

1000664490.english: It is an honor for the Commander to personally guide me.

1000664491.english: I will do my best to live up to your expectations.
1000664491.korean: 기대에 부응할 수 있도록 최선을 다하겠습니다.

1000664493.english: - I leisurely guided Sonia around the base.

1000664494.english: - While introducing various locations, Sonia only nodded and confirmed the positions, showing no distinct reactions.
1000664494.korean: - 돌아다니면서 여러 장소를 소개해줬지만 소니아는 고개를 끄덕이고 위치만 확인할 뿐, 뚜렷한 반응을 보이지 않았다.

1000664495.english: - I had planned to use any favorable reactions as a topic to start a conversation, but…
1000664495.korean: - 호의적인 반응을 보이는 게 있으면 그걸 화제로 대화의 물꼬를 틀려고 했는데…

1000664496.english: - We reached a dead-end around a corner.

1000664497.english: - Many areas in the base were under construction, so some places differed from my memory.
1000664497.korean: - 거점에는 공사가 진행중인 곳이 많아서 내 기억과 다른 곳이 드문드문 있었다.

1000664498.english: - As I tried to take out a panel to check the map…
1000664498.korean: - 내가 패널을 꺼내 지도를 확인하려 할 때…

1000664499.english: If you wish to go further, it seems you can proceed this way.
1000664499.korean: 이 뒤로 가길 원하시면 이쪽으로 가시면 될 거 같습니다.

1000664501.english: - Following her led me to the location I had wanted.
1000664501.korean: - 그 뒤를 따라가니 내가 원하던 곳이 나왔다.

1000664502.english: It is similar to urban planning laws of the old era.

1000664503.english: - Just from walking around a little, Sonia had already grasped the structure of the base.
1000664503.korean: - 거점을 조금 돌아다닌 것으로도 소니아는 이미 거점의 구조를 파악했다.

1000664504.english: - The rank of Inspector was not given to her without reason.
1000664504.korean: - 경정이라는 계급이 그녀에게 괜히 주어진 게 아닌가 보다.

1000664506.english: - Sonia asked indifferently about the next destination.

1000664507.english: - I continued guiding her, thinking it might be fine to let her walk around alone.
1000664507.korean: - 나는 그냥 소니아 혼자 돌아다니게 해도 되지 않을까 하는 생각을 하면서 계속 소니아를 안내했다.

1000664509.english: - We arrived at the Fountain Plaza.

1000664510.english: - Being the central area of the base, it was full of the energy of the members.
1000664510.korean: - 거점의 중심지라고 할 수 있는 곳이기에 대원들의 활기로 가득했다.

1000664511.english: - There, Sonia scanned the surroundings like a hawk looking for prey.
1000664511.korean: - 그곳에서 소니아는 먹잇감을 찾는 매처럼 주위를 둘러보았다.

1000664512.english: - Before long, something caught her attention.
1000664512.korean: - 그리고 오래지 않아 무언가가 그녀의 눈에 들어왔다.

1000664513.english: Commander, I understand that one of the reasons for my restoration was to maintain public order.
1000664513.korean: 사령관님, 저를 복원하신 이유 중 하나가 치안 유지라고 알고 있습니다.

1000664514.english: If it is not inconvenient, may I be allowed to briefly leave my post to maintain order?
1000664514.korean: 실례가 되지 않는다면 치안 유지를 위해 잠시 자리를 비우는 것을 허락해 주시겠습니까?

1000664515.english: - I looked around, but saw nothing unusual.
1000664515.korean: - 나는 주위를 둘러보았다. 하지만 내 눈에는 특별한 이상이 보이지 않았다.

1000664516.english: - However, to a specialist like her, there must have been elements that destabilized public order.
1000664516.korean: - 하지만 전문가인 그녀에게는 치안을 불안하게 만드는 요소가 보인 것이겠지.

1000664518.english: - Following Sonia, I approached the individual causing public order instability in the base.
1000664518.korean: - 소니아를 따라 거점의 치안 불안요소가 되는 인물에게 다가갔다.

1000664519.english: - At the end of Sonia's steps…

1000664520.english: Your Majesty? What is this… Oh my, your uniform is disheveled.
1000664520.korean: 폐하? 이 어미에게 무슨… 이런. 복장이 흐트러지셨군요.

1000664521.english: How can you set an example for others in such a state?
1000664521.korean: 흐트러진 복장으로 어찌 다른 이들의 본이 될 수 있을까요?

1000664522.english: Allow me to adjust it for you.

1000664524.english: - I watched Sekhmet adjust the uniform. No matter how I looked, I saw nothing in Sekhmet that could destabilize order.
1000664524.korean: - 나는 단장을 해주는 세크메트를 바라보았다. 하지만 아무리 봐도 세크메트에게서 치안을 불안하게 만드는 요소가 보이지 않았다.

1000664525.english: - When I looked at Sonia, she spoke coldly:
1000664525.korean: - 내가 소니아를 바라보자 소니아는 차갑게 말했다.

1000664526.english: I am arresting you for public indecency.

1000664528.english: What part of me is indecent?

1000664529.english: Are you saying such things while wearing such an outrageous uniform?
1000664529.korean: 그런 파렴치한 복장을 하고 그런 소리를 하는 것인가?

1000664530.english: Outrageous? This uniform was approved by Your Majesty.
1000664530.korean: 파렴치라니요? 이 복장은 폐하께서도 인정한 옷입니다.

1000664532.english: Do I appear indecent to you?

1000664534.english: - Sekhmet was confidently showing herself to me.
1000664534.korean: - 세크메트는 나에게 당당히 자신의 모습을 보여주고 있었다.

1000664539.english: Your Majesty, please look at me.

1000664540.english: - Sekhmet came back into my sight.

1000664541.english: Could it be… that you dislike my uniform?
1000664541.korean: 설마, 어미의 복장이 마음에 안 드시는 겁니까?

1000664543.english: - I immediately stopped Sekhmet and looked at Sonia.

1000664547.english: I apologize. This is my first assignment today, and I made a mistake.
1000664547.korean: 실례했다. 오늘 처음으로 배치되어 과오를 범했군.

1000664549.english: - The police officer and the innocent party apologized, were forgiven, and built mutual trust.
1000664549.korean: - 경찰과 무혐의자는 사과하고 사과받으며 우정을 다졌다.

1000664550.english: - I felt relieved that Sonia was not entirely rigid…
1000664550.korean: - 나는 소니아가 마냥 딱딱한 사람이 아니라는 것에 안도…

1000664551.english: Only, I was a little concerned about Your Majesty's reaction to my uniform…
1000664551.korean: 다만 폐하께서 제 복장에 대해서 보인 반응이 조금 신경 쓰이는…

1000664552.english: - Before Sekhmet could finish speaking, I took Sonia's hand and moved to the next location.
1000664552.korean: - 세크메트의 말이 끝나기 전에 소니아의 손을 잡아끌며 다음 장소로 이동했다.

1000664553.english: - After wandering around the ark for some time, night had already fallen.
1000664553.korean: - 방주를 한참 돌아다니다 보니 어느새 밤이 되었다.

1000664554.english: Well, there are a few concerning areas, but I will check them directly as we go.
1000664554.korean: 뭐, 조금 신경 쓰이는 곳이 있기는 한데, 이건 직접 돌아다니면서 확인하겠습니다.

1000664555.english: - Sonia's demeanor seemed to have changed slightly.
1000664555.korean: - 소니아의 분위기가 조금 변한 것 같다.

1000664556.english: - Her previously rigid tone and expression had softened considerably.
1000664556.korean: - 처음에는 딱딱하기만 했던 그녀의 말투와 표정도 많이 부드러워졌다.

1000664557.english: Is there a pub nearby? Handling intoxicated individuals is part of the duty.
1000664557.korean: 혹시 근처에 주점은 없습니까? 취객을 상대하는 것도 업무 중 하나라서 말입니다.

1000664558.english: - As I was guiding Sonia to Café Amor…
1000664558.korean: - 내가 소니아를 카페 아모르로 안내하려고 할 때…

1000664559.english: Oh, who do we have here?

1000664561.english: Inspector Sonia! So you've finally joined Orca as well?
1000664561.korean: 소니아 경정! 자네도 드디어 오르카에 합류했나?

1000664562.english: I am very capable, after all.

1000664564.english: So, how do you find this place after looking around?

1000664565.english: It's a nice place. Everyone is smiling.

1000664566.english: Hmm… quite a sweet spot to enjoy honey, indeed.
1000664566.korean: 음음. 꿀 빨기 참으로 좋은 곳이긴 하지.

1000664567.english: You mean electricity, not honey, right?

1000664572.english: - After chatting warmly with Pub Head, Sonia turned her gaze back to me.
1000664572.korean: - 소니아는 펍헤드와 화기애애하게 대화를 한 후 다시 나에게 시선을 돌렸다.

1000664573.english: Ah, sorry, Commander. I ran into someone I know.
1000664573.korean: 아, 미안해, 사령관님. 반가운 사람을 만나서 말이야.

1000664574.english: - Putting aside the fact that today was her first real meeting with Pub Head after her restoration…
1000664574.korean: - 소니아가 오늘 복원돼서 펍헤드와 실질적으로 처음 만났다는 것은 둘째치고…

1000664575.english: - Her attitude suddenly seems to have changed drastically.
1000664575.korean: - 태도가 갑자기 너무 변한 거 같은데?

1000664576.english: Great! Commander, since you guided me today, I'll treat you to a drink.
1000664576.korean: 좋아! 사령관님. 나 안내해 주느라 오늘 고생했으니 술 한잔 대접할게.

1000664579.english: - I took the smiling Sonia and headed toward Café Amor.
1000664579.korean: - 싱글벙글 웃는 소니아를 데리고 카페 아모르로 향했다.

1000664586.english: Haha. Nice to meet you, my buddy.

1000664587.english: I've been waiting for you to join, and now we finally meet.
1000664587.korean: 언제 합류하나 기다렸는데 마침내 만나게 되는군.

1000664588.english: Don't think about slacking off; the work you're taking on is a mountain.
1000664588.korean: 네가 맡아야 할 일이 산더미니 농땡이 부릴 생각 마라.

1000664589.english: I know you're happy to see me after so long, but can we talk about work later?
1000664589.korean: 오랜만에 날 만나서 반가운 건 알겠는데. 일 이야기는 나중에 하면 안 될까?

1000664591.english: And now you're trying to sneak past me? No way.
1000664591.korean: 그러면서 슬금슬금 날 피해 다니려고? 안 돼.

1000664592.english: Hey, buddy. Why act like that? We were close, weren't we?
1000664592.korean: 이봐 버디. 섭섭하게 왜 이래? 우리 좋았잖아.

1000664593.english: In happiness, in sadness, in hardship, in comfort… even if death separates us, we meet again like this.
1000664593.korean: 기쁠 때나, 슬플 때나, 힘들 때나, 편할 때나, 죽음이 두 사람을 갈라놓을지라도 이렇게 다시 만날 정도로.

1000664594.english: Say something that might make others misunderstand, and I'll show you the thrill of it.
1000664594.korean: 남들이 오해할 소리 하면 짜릿한 맛을 보여주마.

1000664595.english: - Watching Sonia and Sadius bicker amicably made me smile naturally.
1000664595.korean: - 소니아와 사디어스가 사이좋게 티격태격하는 모습을 보니 저절로 웃음이 나왔다.

1000664596.english: - Sonia glanced at me out of the corner of her eye, then quietly approached Sadius, draped her arm over her shoulder, and whispered.
1000664596.korean: - 소니아는 나를 곁눈질하다가 슬그머니 사디어스에게 다가가 어깨에 팔을 얹고 속삭였다.

1000664597.english: Shall I tell you what kind of person the Commander is?

1000664598.english: - If you're going to whisper, don't make it audible…

1000664599.english: You can tell just by looking, can't you?

1000664600.english: Not just the appearance, but the back as well, right?
1000664600.korean: 아니, 겉모습뿐만 아니라 뒷모습도 있잖아. 안 그래?

1000664602.english: Don't hide too much. I'm part of the Orca City Guard now too. Isn't it important to know about your superior?
1000664602.korean: 너무 숨기지 말라고. 나도 이제 오르카 시티 가드 소속이잖아. 상사에 대해서 아는 건 중요하지 않겠어?

1000664604.english: Do you think it makes a difference?
1000664604.korean: 너라고 별 수 있을 줄 아나?

1000664605.english: Many strong figures in Orca challenged the Commander and were all defeated.
1000664605.korean: 오르카의 수많은 강자들도 사령관에게 도전했다가 전부 패배하고 말았다.

1000664606.english: At first, they thought they were different… but in the end…
1000664606.korean: 모두 처음에는 자신은 다를 거라고 생각했지만… 결국엔…

1000664607.english: - Seeing Sadius blush as she said that, it seemed she was recalling her own defeats.
1000664607.korean: - 그렇게 말하고 얼굴을 붉히는 것을 보면 사디어스도 자신의 패배를 곱씹고 있는 것 같았다.

1000664609.english: I asked about the Commander's character, you know?
1000664609.korean: 내가 물은 건 사령관의 됨됨이에 대한 건데?

1000664612.english: Well, if this is useful, it's useful, so I'll remember it…
1000664612.korean: 뭐, 이것도 유용하다면 유용하니 잘 기억해두겠…

1000664613.english: Um… buddy? That crackling sound—am I imagining it?
1000664613.korean: 저기… 버디? 전기 튀는 소리 나는 건 내 기분 탓이지?

1000664614.english: You're still flipping people's minds like always.
1000664614.korean: 너는 예나 지금이나 사람 속 뒤집는 건 여전하군.

1000664615.english: If I have to say it, we're not humans—we're Bioroids…
1000664615.korean: 구태여 말하자면 우리는 사람이 아니라 바이오로이드…

1000664617.english: Buddy! Did you forget that you can't aim the muzzle carelessly?
1000664617.korean: 버디! 총구를 함부로 겨누면 안 되는 걸 잊었어?

1000664619.english: That's a bit extreme for a welcome greeting.

1000664621.english: - Sonia grabbed my hand and ran.

1000664623.english: Hahaha. That temper hasn't changed at all.
1000664623.korean: 하하하. 역시 저 성질머리가 어디 가지는 않네.

1000664625.english: Wow, meeting a superior who actually cares for us… I feel really lucky.
1000664625.korean: 이야, 이렇게 우리들을 걱정해 주는 상관을 만나다니 참 복받은 거 같아.

1000664627.english: Even though Sadius and I have never met directly, we know each other through the knowledge implanted in our memories.
1000664627.korean: 나와 사디어스는 직접 만난 적은 없어도 지식으로 주입된 기억으로 서로가 어떤지 알고 있으니까.

1000664628.english: We trust each other, which is why we can bicker like this.
1000664628.korean: 서로를 믿으니까 이렇게 티격태격할 수 있는거지.

1000664629.english: Do you think I'd call Sadius my buddy for no reason?

1000664630.english: Still, I pushed her a bit too hard this time, so I'll have to avoid her for a while.
1000664630.korean: 그래도 이번엔 내가 좀 심하게 자극해서 당분간은 피해 다녀야겠지만.

1000664631.english: - Sonia laughed cheerfully, showing no sign of reflection.
1000664631.korean: - 소니아는 반성하는 기색 없이 낄낄 웃었다.

1000664632.english: But I feel a little bad for not being able to treat them to a drink as I had promised…
1000664632.korean: 하지만 술 대접하겠다고 말해놓고 대접 못한 게 조금 마음에 걸리긴 하네…

1000664633.english: Serving someone busy for personal reasons would only be a burden.
1000664633.korean: 공사다망하신 분을 사적인 이유로 모시는 것도 폐가 되잖아.

1000664635.english: - Sonia said this and stepped aside.

1000664636.english: - A short while later, Sonia appeared holding two flasks filled with liquid.
1000664636.korean: - 그리고 잠시 후 소니아는 액체가 든 플라스크를 두 개를 들고 나타났다.

1000664637.english: Haha, some fortune teller said it was a gift according to mutual benefit and a win-win strategy.
1000664637.korean: 하하, 어떤 점쟁이가 상부상조, 윈윈전략에 따른 증여를 해주더라고.

1000664638.english: It would be nice if you called it a gift given out of mutual benefit, a win-win strategy, or a heartfelt present.
1000664638.korean: 상부상조, 윈윈전략에 따른 증여 혹은 마음이 담긴 선물이라고 해주면 좋겠어.

1000664639.english: - Her face smiled, but her voice was firm.

1000664642.english: - Sitting side by side on a bench, we had a modest drink with Circe's Brainstorm—her gift.
1000664642.korean: - 벤치에 나란히 앉아, 키르케의 뇌무- 선물로 조촐한 술자리를 가졌다.

1000664643.english: This is a good place. Very much so.

1000664645.english: Everyone is smiling, full of energy.

1000664646.english: Outside, there are enemies we wouldn't dare face, but I see no one despairing or speaking pessimistically about it.
1000664646.korean: 밖에는 우리가 엄두도 내지 못할 적들이 가득하지만 그것에 절망하거나 비관적인 소리를 하는 사람은 보이지 않았어.

1000664647.english: There's a strong hope that we can overcome hardships like these.
1000664647.korean: 이따위 고난은 얼마든지 넘길 수 있다는 강인한 희망이 느껴져.

1000664648.english: Materially, the old era was more abundant, but spiritually, this place is richer.
1000664648.korean: 물질적인 건 옛 시대가 더 풍요로웠지만 정신적인 건 지금 이곳이 더 풍요로워.

1000664649.english: Of course, just because it's peaceful now doesn't mean the future will be, but maintaining this peace is my duty, right?
1000664649.korean: 물론 지금이 평화롭다고 미래가 평화로운 건 아니지만, 이 평화를 유지하는 게 나의 임무잖아?

1000664650.english: Hahaha! I'll work hard so I can slack off without worry.
1000664650.korean: 하핫! 내가 마음 놓고 농땡이를 부릴 수 있도록 열심히 할게.

1000664651.english: - Sonia grinned widely as she tilted her flask.
1000664651.korean: - 소니아는 싱글벙글 웃으며 플라스크를 기울이다가 말했다.

1000664652.english: Ah. If I had known the boss was like this, I wouldn't have made that first greeting.
1000664652.korean: 아아. 보스가 이런 사람인 줄 알았으면 첫인사를 그렇게 하지 말걸 그랬어.

1000664653.english: Showing this side to such a strict superior would make workplace life exhausting.
1000664653.korean: 깐깐한 상사한테 지금 같은 모습을 보여주면 직장 생활이 피곤해질 거 아냐.

1000664654.english: I feel a bit sorry for testing the boss.
1000664654.korean: 보스를 떠본 거 같아서 조금 미안하네.

1000664655.english: I knew you would be like this.

1000664656.english: Now that I understand what kind of person you are… may I do the first greeting again?
1000664656.korean: 보스가 어떤 사람인지 파악했으니… 첫인사를 다시해도 될까?

1000664657.english: - After taking a sip of her drink in response to my answer, Sonia greeted me again.
1000664657.korean: - 나의 대답에 소니아는 술로 목을 축인 후 다시 나에게 인사를 했다.

1000664658.english: Hey! So you're the boss? Nice to meet you. I'm Inspector Sonia of the City Guard. Just to be sure, your workload isn't too tough, right?
1000664658.korean: 여! 당신이 보스구나? 반가워, 난 시티 가드의 소니아 경정. 혹시나 해서 물어보는데, 업무가 빡빡하진 않지?

1000664659.english: - Her first greeting reflected her personality well.

1000664660.english: - After the second greeting, Sonia smiled slyly and extended her hand.
1000664660.korean: - 두 번째 첫인사를 마친 소니아는 능글맞게 웃으며 나에게 손을 내밀었다.

1000664661.english: I look forward to working with you, boss.

1000664663.english: - Just as I felt trust from the hand I held, I hoped she would feel trust from mine as well.
1000664663.korean: - 내가 잡은 손에서 신뢰감이 느껴지는 것처럼, 그녀가 잡은 내 손에서도 신뢰감이 느껴지길 바랐다.

1000664664.english: - While walking around Fountain Plaza, we heard noises from Circe's fortune shop, so we went in…
1000664664.korean: - 분수광장 주위를 돌아다니던 중 키르케의 점술집에서 웬일로 소리가 들려 들어가 보니…

1000664665.english: So, you see~. My secret liquor just exploded, kaboom~.
1000664665.korean: 그래서 말이죠오~. 제 비장의 술이 콰광하고 터진 거 있죠오~.

1000664666.english: This must be the drink that, if the two of us drank it, we wouldn't even notice if we died.
1000664666.korean: 둘이 마시다가 두 사람이 죽어도 모를 술이라는 게 이거였구나.

1000664667.english: Would you like to try it~? There are still a few bottles left.
1000664667.korean: 한 번 마셔보시겠어요오~? 아직 몇 병 남았는데?

1000664668.english: Ehei~ Put it back. Put it back. You can't just take that out carelessly.
1000664668.korean: 에헤이~ 넣어둬. 넣어둬. 그런 거 함부로 꺼내는 거 아니야.

1000664669.english: - Circe and Sonia were passing drinks back and forth.
1000664669.korean: - 키르케와 소니아가 술잔을 주거니 받거니 하는 것을 발견했다.

1000664670.english: Hey~ Boss. How about a drink too?
1000664670.korean: 여~ 보스. 보스도 한 잔 어때?

1000664672.english: - It was a good time to work…

1000664675.english: - All I saw were two drunks sipping drinks.
1000664675.korean: - 주정뱅이 둘이서 술을 홀짝이는 것만 보였다.

1000664678.english: There's a reason for the saying "Great achievements take time."
1000664678.korean: 대기만성이라는 말이 괜히 있는 건 아니잖아.

1000664679.english: A time will come when we look back and say, "Ah, those were the good times."
1000664679.korean: 나중에 ‘아, 그때가 좋았었지.’하고 그리워할 때가 올 거라고.

1000664682.english: - A Dutch girl entered Circe's fortune shop.

1000664684.english: - As Dutch Girl entered, one drunk vanished, and a proper witch appeared.
1000664684.korean: - 더치걸이 들어오자 술주정뱅이 하나가 사라지고 멀쩡한 마녀가 나타났다.

1000664686.english: No! Not busy at all. I'm free. Always.
1000664686.korean: 아뇨! 안 바빠요. 저 한가해요. 언제나.

1000664687.english: - Circe fussed about trying to tidy the table turned into a drinking spot, but the table had already been cleaned.
1000664687.korean: - 키르케는 호들갑을 떨면서 술판이 된 탁자 위를 정리하려고 했지만, 탁자 위는 어느새 말끔히 치워져있었다.

1000664689.english: - Sonia was seen subtly winking at Circe.
1000664689.korean: - 소니아가 슬쩍 키르케에게 윙크를 하는 게 보였다.

1000664690.english: - Circe nodded slightly, seated Dutch Girl in front of her, and asked:
1000664690.korean: - 키르케는 작게 고개를 끄덕이고 더치걸을 자기 앞자리에 앉히고 물었다.

1000664694.english: It's not particularly valuable… just… a scrap of metal…
1000664694.korean: 그렇게 가치 있는 물건은 아닌데… 그냥… 철판 조각인데…

1000664695.english: But it's precious to you, Dutch Girl, isn't it?

1000664697.english: You're looking for this, right? Got it.

1000664698.english: Don't worry, I'll find it using my full fortune-telling skills.
1000664698.korean: 안심하세요, 제 점술 경력을 모두 걸고 찾아내겠어요.

1000664699.english: And if fortune-telling fails, I'll search by foot.

1000664700.english: - Circe spoke solemnly and began her divination.
1000664700.korean: - 키르케는 비장하게 말하며 점을 치기 시작했다.

1000664701.english: - Her demeanor was more serious than ever.
1000664701.korean: - 키르케의 태도는 그 어느 때보다 진지했다.

1000664703.english: Not just yours, but the feelings of others too…
1000664703.korean: 더치걸 님뿐만 아니라 다른 분들의 마음까지…

1000664704.english: It seems it's not far from here…

1000664706.english: - Circe, while divining, made a strange sound and looked around.
1000664706.korean: - 점을 치던 키르케는 이상한 소리를 내고 두리번거렸다.

1000664709.english: - While everyone looked around, Sonia produced something and placed it between them.
1000664709.korean: - 모두가 주위를 두리번거릴 때, 소니아가 뭔가를 꺼내 두 사람 사이에 내려놓았다.

1000664710.english: - It was a scrap of metal small enough to fit in a palm—an object invisible among ordinary scrap metal.
1000664710.korean: - 손바닥 안에 들어오는 철판 조각이었다. 고철을 모아두면 전혀 눈에 들어오지 않을 물건.

1000664711.english: - The only notable feature was that someone had handled it so much that it was smooth and polished.
1000664711.korean: - 그나마 특이한 점이 있다면 누군가가 잔뜩 만져서 반질반질하다는 것.

1000664712.english: - And a few numbers were engraved on its surface.
1000664712.korean: - 그리고 표면에 숫자 몇 개가 새겨져 있다는 것.

1000664716.english: - Dutch Girl fiddled with the metal piece and spoke.

1000664717.english: A long time ago… when I was at the mine… with the sisters in my group… we made this…
1000664717.korean: 옛날에… 광산에 있을 때… 같은 조에 있던… 자매들이랑… 만든 거예요…

1000664718.english: We took a piece of metal from a broken drill… and engraved our numbers on it.
1000664718.korean: 고장 난 드릴에서 철판을 떼서… 각자의 번호를 새겼어요.

1000664719.english: So that we would never forget each other…

1000664721.english: - As Dutch Girl's words fell, everyone became solemn. Sonia then stood and said:
1000664721.korean: - 더치걸의 말에 모두가 숙연해졌을 때, 소니아가 자리에서 일어나며 말했다.

1000664722.english: If you ever lose something, come find the City Guard first, little lady.
1000664722.korean: 잃어버린 물건이 있으면 먼저 시티 가드를 찾아오라고, 꼬마 아가씨.

1000664723.english: Our job isn't only about punishing the bad guys.
1000664723.korean: 나쁜 녀석들을 혼내주는 것만이 우리 일은 아니니까.

1000664724.english: - Saying this, Sonia took me outside.
1000664724.korean: - 소니아는 그렇게 말하며 나를 데리고 밖으로 나섰다.

1000664726.english: - Watching Sonia walk with a lighthearted but relaxed stride, I couldn't help but ask:
1000664726.korean: - 콧노래를 부르며 느긋하지만 경쾌한 발걸음으로 걷는 소니아를 보며 나는 물을 수밖에 없었다.

1000664728.english: I wandered around a bit earlier and found this scrap of metal.
1000664728.korean: 아까 적당히 돌아다니다가 철판 조각 하나를 찾았거든.

1000664729.english: It was too worn to be just scrap, and the engraved numbers made it clear it was important to someone.
1000664729.korean: 그냥 고철이라기에는 손때가 많이 묻었고, 의미심장한 숫자가 새겨져있어서 누구에게는 중요한 물건이겠구나 싶었지.

1000664730.english: If I had left it there, someone might have thrown it away as scrap, so I brought it to find the owner.
1000664730.korean: 그냥 두고 가면 모르는 사람이 고철로 버리겠구나 싶어서 가지고 와서 누구 건지 찾아봤어.

1000664731.english: I measured the metal's thickness, examined the surface for remaining paint and substances, and identified it as part of equipment used in a specific abandoned mine.
1000664731.korean: 철판 두께를 측정하고, 표면 검사를 통해 아직 남아 있는 도료와 물질을 조사해서 특정 폐광에서 쓰던 장비의 일부라는 것을 밝혀냈지.

1000664732.english: If the piece came from a specific abandoned mine, then the person who used it wasn't restored in Orca but must have joined from outside, right?
1000664732.korean: 특정 폐광에서 지냈다면 오르카에서 복원된 대원이 아니라 외부에서 합류한 대원이겠지?

1000664733.english: And a member who had spent time in the mine, whose number on the metal plate matches their own.
1000664733.korean: 그리고 광산에서 지낸 적이 있는, 거기에 플러스로 철판에 있는 숫자랑 자신의 번호까지 일치하는 대원.

1000664734.english: You could go find the owner and return it, but if your paths cross awkwardly, it would be troublesome, right?
1000664734.korean: 주인을 찾아가서 전해줄 수도 있겠지만 그러다가 길이 엇갈리면 귀찮아질 거 아냐.

1000664735.english: And while this metal is precious to its owner, to a third party, it's just a scrap of metal.
1000664735.korean: 그리고 이 철판 주인에게는 소중한 물건이지만 제삼자들에게는 그냥 철판 쪼가리잖아.

1000664736.english: The owner wants to find the lost metal but, knowing how it might look to others, can't ask for help recklessly—not even from the City Guard.
1000664736.korean: 주인은 잃어버린 철판을 찾고 싶어하지만 그 철판이 남들에게 어떻게 보일지 아니까 함부로 도움을 청하지 못하겠지? 시티 가드에게도.

1000664737.english: But the owner would want to find it. So they'd ask someone they truly trust for help.
1000664737.korean: 하지만 주인은 찾고 싶어하겠지. 그래서 자신과 정말로 친한 누군가에게 도움을 청하겠지?

1000664738.english: And that trusted person happens to be someone I'm also close with.
1000664738.korean: 그런데 그 친한 누군가가 나랑도 친한 사람이란 말이지. 그 친한 사람이랑 대화를 하다가 알게 됐지.

1000664739.english: Through talking with that trusted person, I realized this. I figured that if I waited there with that person, the owner would eventually come looking for it.
1000664739.korean: 그 사람이랑 같이 기다리고 있으면 주인이 찾아오겠구나 싶어서 기다리고 있었단 이 말씀.

1000664740.english: - Hearing Sonia say this, I couldn't help but clap.
1000664740.korean: - 소니아의 말에 나도 모르게 박수를 치고 말았다.

1000664741.english: I told you, boss. I was working.

1000664742.english: I don't slack off—interacting with people is part of the work.
1000664742.korean: 내가 괜히 농땡ㅇ- 사람들과 교류를 하는 게 아니라고.

1000664743.english: - Sonia subtly corrected herself, but her laughter made it clear it was a joke.
1000664743.korean: - 소니아는 슬그머니 자신의 말을 정정했지만 그녀의 웃음을 보면 장난으로 그런 것이 뻔히 보였다.

1000664744.english: - Seeing her in action, I could laugh along with her.
1000664744.korean: - 하지만 그녀의 활약을 본 나는 그녀의 장난에 같이 웃을 수 있었다.

1000664745.english: See? So please keep an eye on me, boss.
1000664745.korean: 그렇다니까. 그러니까 나 좀 잘 봐달라고 보스.

1000664746.english: My performance comes from proper rest…

1000664747.english: - Sonia suddenly stopped speaking and bolted away.
1000664747.korean: - 소니아는 말을 하다 말고 갑자기 도망치기 시작했다.

1000664749.english: Commander. I think Sonia was just here, do you know where she went?
1000664749.korean: 사령관. 방금 소니아가 있었던 거 같은데, 어디로 갔는지 아나?

1000664750.english: I said there would be combat training this morning, but she didn't attend!
1000664750.korean: 오늘 아침부터 전투훈련이 있다고 말했는데 참석하지 않았다!

1000664751.english: I had planned training in advance, anticipating she might be absent, but skipping it is unacceptable.
1000664751.korean: 이런 일이 있을 것을 예상하고 소니아가 없을 때의 훈련계획을 미리 짜뒀지만, 훈련을 빠트린 것은 결코 용납못하지.

1000664752.english: - I pointed toward the direction Sonia ran.

1000664753.english: - Not out of betrayal, but because I trusted Sonia could run well.
1000664753.korean: - 배신이라기보다는 소니아라면 잘 도망칠 수 있을 거라고 믿고.

1000664755.english: I'll fix that messed-up mindset of yours, Sonia.

1000664757.english: - Whether Sonia escapes safely or Sadius catches her,
1000664757.korean: - 소니아가 무사히 도망가든, 사디어스가 소니아를 잡든.

1000664758.english: - I was confident that with these two, and the City Guard present, Orca's security would be fine.
1000664758.korean: - 두 사람이, 시티 가드가 있다면 오르카의 치안에는 문제가 없을 것이라고 확신하며.

1000664759.english: - I strolled through the peaceful base.

1000664761.english: Follow me. I'll show you around the base.

1000664762.english: Most of the goods you need can be obtained here.
1000664762.korean: 기호품은 대부분 이곳에서 구할 수 있어.

1000664763.english: And past here… a dead end?

1000664764.english: There used to be a path here recently.

1000664772.english: It's fine. It's just a conquest for Sekhmet.

1000664773.english: There's a guideline for public obscenity, so read it later.

1000664774.english: Sonia! We don't have much time, shall we head somewhere else?
1000664774.korean: 소니아! 시간이 별로 없으니 다른 곳으로 갈까?

1000664775.english: We've seen all the important spots. Anything you want to ask?
1000664775.korean: 중요한 곳은 전부 돌아봤어, 물어볼 거 있어?

1000664776.english: There's a nearby place called Café Amor.

1000664779.english: You two… really get along, huh?

1000664780.english: I'm fine. I'll get served next time.

1000664784.english: How do you feel after looking around here?

1000664786.english: So your first impression was masked after all?
1000664786.korean: 역시 첫 모습은 가면을 쓴 거였어?

1000664793.english: With Sonia around, there's no case she can't handle, huh?
1000664793.korean: 소니아가 있으면 해결 못 할 사건은 없겠는데?

1000664795.english: Um… I think they went that way.

1000664796.english: I heard I could just lie down, but this situation... is an unexpected variable. What the Commander wants from me, what I can give the Commander — I’ll have to recalculate from the start... Hmm, fine.&nSo what should I call you now, Commander? Husband? Darling? In this case... Prince?
1000664796.korean: 누워만 있어도 된다는 건 들었는데, 이 상황은... 예상 못한 변수네. 사령관이 나한테 뭘 원하는지,&n내가 사령관한테 뭘 해줄 수 있는지는 처음부터 다시 계산해봐야겠지만... 응, 좋아.&n그럼 이제 사령관 호칭을 뭐라고 해야 하지. 남편? 여보? 이 경우에는... 왕자님인가?​

1000664797.english: I tried the push-and-pull thing because they said it was important, and I didn’t expect it to be this effective.&nI should've tried it sooner. ...An answer? Haha! Right. I was being uncharacteristically roundabout.&nMy answer... I’ll show it with actions rather than words. Shall I go now?
1000664797.korean: 밀고 당기는 게 중요하대서 한번 해봤더니 이렇게 효과적일 줄은 몰랐는데.&n이럴 줄 알았으면 진작 해볼 걸 그랬어. ...대답? 하하! 그러네. 나답지 않게 돌려 말했나봐.&n대답은... 말보다 행동으로 보여주겠어. 지금 갈까?

1000664803.english: - We have lost contact with the Anger of the Horde who went out on scouting missions. We have tried every means possible to establish communication, but there has been absolutely no progress.
1000664803.korean: - 척후로 나간 앵거 오브 호드의 소식이 끊겼다. 온갖 수단을 써서 통신을 시도해봤지만, 전혀 진전이 없다.

1000664804.english: That is a very powerful jamming signal. It is probably an operation to lure the advance unit deep inside and isolate them.
1000664804.korean: 굉장히 강력한 방해 전파입니다. 아마도 선행 부대를 안쪽 깊숙이 끌어들인 후 고립시키는 작전이겠죠.

1000664805.english: Unless the location can be pinpointed, we have no choice but to search by scattering, but that won't do...
1000664805.korean: 위치를 특정할 수 없는 이상, 흩어져서 탐색할 수 밖에 없습니다만 그래서는...

1000664806.english: Yes, that must be the enemy's ploy. The safety of the Horde forces itself is the bait to lure us in.
1000664806.korean: 네, 그것이 적의 노림수겠죠. 호드 부대의 안위 그 자체가 우리를 낚을 미끼입니다.

1000664807.english: - I grind my teeth in frustration. Iron Bug, to think they would devise such a meticulous plan......
1000664807.korean: - 갑갑한 마음에 이를 간다. 철충이, 설마 이토록 용의주도한 계획을 세울 줄이야......

1000664808.english: For now, the only option is to maintain our formation while breaking the enemy's control and increasing the Khan's chances of breaking through the encirclement on their own, even if only slightly. We must not be swayed by anxiety.
1000664808.korean: 우선은 진형을 유지한 채 적의 지배권을 무너트리고, 칸 쪽에서 자력으로 포위를 돌파할 가능성을 조금이라도 높이는 수밖에 없습니다. 초조함에 휘둘려선 안 됩니다.

1000664809.english: Yes, I look forward to working with you.

1000664810.english: The sound of an explosion right now is......

1000664811.english: Ah, I guess I've been tricked. My darling, I wanted to at least see you off until the very end...
1000664811.korean: 아아~ 당해버렸나. 내 귀염둥이, 하다못해 마지막은 지켜봐주고 싶었는데......

1000664812.english: Well, thanks to that, the captain must have gone a few kilometers further, and our location won't be discovered for a while.
1000664812.korean: 뭐 덕분에 대장이 몇 km라도 더 갔을 테고, 우리 위치도 한동안은 들키지 않을 거야.

1000664813.english: Hey, it's not too late, even now. You guys go ahead first. I'm perfectly fine here on my own...
1000664813.korean: 이봐, 지금이라도 늦지 않았어. 너희만이라도 먼저 가. 여기는 나 혼자서도 충분하니까......

1000664814.english: Should I stitch up that mouth of yours along with your wound? Instead of telling boring jokes, sing a song. I'm bored.
1000664814.korean: 상처랑 같이 그 입도 꿰매 줄까? 재미없는 농담할 바엔 노래나 한 곡 뽑아봐. 심심하니까.

1000664815.english: ......Seriously, this is so annoying. It's such unnecessary interference. If you had just left me alone, I would have taken care of the cleanup myself......
1000664815.korean: ......진짜 짜증나. 쓸데없는 참견이라고. 그냥 내버려 뒀으면 뒤처리는 내가 알아서 했을텐데......

1000664817.english: What kind of shameless nonsense are you spouting, you punk? Do you think I would just let go of a pushover this easy to rip off? I’m only going to dump you after I’ve stripped you of every last bit—front hair, back hair, downy hair, and even dog hair—and turned your skin into a smooth baby's. Understand?
1000664817.korean: 무슨 뻔뻔한 말 하고 앉았어, 임마. 이 정도로 털어먹기 쉬운 호구를 그냥 놔줄 수 있겠냐고. 널 버리는 건 앞털 뒤털 솜털에 개털까지 죄다 털어먹고 맨들맨들 아기 피부로 만들고 나서야. 알겠어?

1000664819.english: Oh, a fight here? Good. This is what a salamander should be like. Let's do it. Then, what do you want?
1000664819.korean: 오, 여기서 한번 붙어? 좋지. 이래야 샐러맨더답지. 해보자고. 그럼 뭐 걸래?

1000664821.english: What? Isn't the rule that you don't touch weapons, even if you're a total loser?!
1000664821.korean: 뭐어? 아무리 개털이라도 무기만큼은 안 건드리는 게 규칙 아니냐고!

1000664822.english: You can't even throw in that state anyway, can you? If you accept, I'll bet this.
1000664822.korean: 어차피 너 그 꼴로는 던지지도 못하잖아? 받아들이겠다면 난 이걸 걸지.

1000664823.english: !? Combat stimulants? Hey! If you had something like that, you should have handed it over right away!
1000664823.korean: !? 전투 자극제? 얌마! 그런 게 있었으면 빨리 내놨어야지!

1000664824.english: No! In its current state, it will only provide pain relief and the wound will open up further!
1000664824.korean: 안 돼요! 지금 상태론 진통 효과만 있을 뿐이고 상처가 더 벌어져요!

1000664825.english: Then if I win, that's all that matters. Stay out of it, Kheshig. I'm going to keep going until I've robbed this guy of all her weapons.
1000664825.korean: 그럼 내가 이기면 장땡이네. 빠져 있어, 케시크. 난 이 녀석 무기를 죄다 털어먹을 때까지 계속할 거니까.

1000664826.english: Hehe, I like this...... Today is the day I'll really make you cry your eyes out!
1000664826.korean: 헤헤, 맘에 드네...... 오늘에야말로 질질 짜게 만들어주지!

1000664828.english: Hehe, that's right! Use this to get the last grenade!
1000664828.korean: 헤헷, 옳지! 이걸로 마지막 수류탄 따시고!

1000664829.english: Damn it! How did this end up like this?!

1000664831.english: (...... It's a scam...... They are definitely scamming......)

1000664832.english: The only thing left is the shotgun. Even so, would it be pitiful to take that out too? Because my night buddy is gone?
1000664832.korean: 남은 건 샷건밖에 없네. 아무리 그래도 그것까지 뜯어내는 건 불쌍하려나? 밤동무가 없어져 버리니까?

1000664833.english: ......Salamander, you really are going to hand over that stimulant if I win, right? You aren't planning on telling Kheshig to cry and beg me if push comes to shove, are you?
1000664833.korean: ......샐러맨더, 너 진짜 내가 이기면 그 자극제 넘길 거지? 여차하면 케시크 보고 나한테 울며 매달리라고 할 작정은 아니겠지?

1000664834.english: Did you hear that, Kheshig? A defeated dog like you is saying this, so you'll vouch for me, right?
1000664834.korean: 들었어, 케시크? 패배한 개 주제에 이렇게 말하는데, 너도 보증해줄 거지?

1000664835.english: No, that is... Yes. Please do as you please. If that is the only way you two will be satisfied.
1000664835.korean: 아니, 그건...... 네. 좋을 대로 해주세요. 그래야 두 분 직성이 풀리신다면야.

1000664836.english: Alright, this is the final showdown... Now, reveal it!

1000664838.english: What, you won? Really? It's my victory!

1000664840.english: Yay, I got the stimulant! Hand it over quickly!

1000664841.english: Well... I guess there's nothing I can do. Here, take this.
1000664841.korean: 이.거.참. 어쩔 수가 없네. 자 받아.

1000664842.english: Azaaah! With this, I'm going to go wild one more time! At least for the ending, I'll make it a spectacular crash......
1000664842.korean: 아자아아! 이걸로 한 번 더 날뛰어 주겠다고! 마지막만큼은 콰광하고 화려하게......

1000664843.english: Flashy...... Huh, huh? What is this, *yawn*...... I'm losing energy... I'm sleepy......
1000664843.korean: 화려하게...... 어, 라? 뭐야, 이거, 후아암...... 힘 빠지네... 졸려......

1000664844.english: Huh? Isn't that an anesthetic, not a combat stimulant? Wow, must have gotten confused. Hehe~
1000664844.korean: 어라~~? 그거 전투자극제가 아니라 마취제 아냐? 와, 헷갈렸나 보네. 데헷~

1000664846.english: ......Good, she's asleep. She should be well-behaved for a while now.

1000664847.english: Why did you go to such lengths?

1000664848.english: If I don't do it this way, this guy won't listen to things like absolute rest. Now, lay her down in a comfortable position.
1000664848.korean: 이렇게라도 하지 않으면 이 녀석 절대안정 같은 말은 들어 먹질 않거든. 자, 편한 자세로 눕혀줘.

1000664849.english: Seriously. Your sleeping face is as cute as a baby's, you know. ......Sorry, but I'm going to borrow your shotgun. I can't go around empty-handed either.
1000664849.korean: 정말이지. 잠자는 얼굴은 아기처럼 귀여운데 말이지. ......미안하지만, 샷건 좀 빌릴게. 나도 맨손으로 있을 수는 없으니까.

1000664851.english: If the Iron Bug realizes that Burning Walker was a bait, they might search this side. I should get ready before that happens.
1000664851.korean: 아까 버닝 워커가 미끼란 걸 눈치채면 철충이 이쪽을 뒤질지도 모르니까. 그렇게 되기 전에 준비해 둬야지.

1000664852.english: Kheshig, you help too. Bring all the grenades over there. You can let the hyena sleep. It won't be able to open its eyes for a while.
1000664852.korean: 케시크, 너도 도와줘. 거기 있는 수류탄 전부 가져와. 하이에나는 자게 내버려둬도 돼. 당분간 눈 못 뜰 테니까.

1000664854.english: Ah, seriously! These guys are so persistent! The sky is swarming with mobile Iron Bugs like a moth swarm...
1000664854.korean: 아 진짜! 이 녀석들, 끈질겨! 하늘은 하늘대로 기동형 철충이 모기떼처럼 우글대고……

1000664855.english: Of course. After all, they went so far as to set a trap like that. They wouldn't be so sloppy as to just leave the airspace empty.
1000664855.korean: 그야 그렇겠지. 저런 함정을 파놨을 정도니까. 상공만 비워 둘 정도로 어설프지는 않을 거야

1000664856.english: Ugh! If it were the me before I switched to the support unit, I would have kicked them all down!
1000664856.korean: 으으~! 지원기로 바뀌기 전의 나였다면 전부 발로 차서 떨어트려 버렸을 텐데!

1000664857.english: Aaaah! This! How dare you… … The only ones allowed to lay a hand on me are Captain Khan and the Commander!
1000664857.korean: 꺄아! 이게! 감히…… 내 몸에 손대도 되는 건 칸 대장님과 사령관님뿐인데!

1000664858.english: (……What should I do? Breaking through is absolutely impossible…… But if I don't hurry by even a minute or a second, the hyena's wound is in danger……)
1000664858.korean: (……어쩌지? 돌파는 도저히 무리야…… 하지만 1분 1초라도 서두르지 않으면 하이에나의 상처가 위험해……)

1000664859.english: Captain Khan said that a distraction alone would be enough... Hehehe, sorry. I'll push myself just a little bit further.
1000664859.korean: 칸 대장님은 교란만으로도 충분하다 했지만…… 에헤헤, 죄송해요. 조금만 더 무리해볼게요.

1000664860.english: (Ascend to the altitude limit... if only I could get above the clouds...)
1000664860.korean: (고도 한계까지 상승…… 구름 위로 빠져나갈 수만 있다면……)

1000664862.english: Aaaargh! It's cold! The power is low! I can't see anything! The Iron Bugs are still following me!
1000664862.korean: 으아아앙! 차가워! 출력이 부족해! 아무것도 안 보여! 아직도 철충이 따라와!

1000664863.english: To think you targeted this Talonfeather's low angle... you really know what's good!
1000664863.korean: 이 탈론페더의 로우 앵글을 노리다니, 좋은 건 알아가지고!

1000664864.english: (On top of that, I don't even have the momentum to perform evasive maneuvers…… It's dangerous, I can't anymore……)
1000664864.korean: (거기다 회피 기동할 추진력도 없어…… 위험해, 이제 더는……)

1000664865.english: No! Just a little more, even a little higher! Then… …
1000664865.korean: 안돼! 조금만 더, 조금이라도 높이! 그러면……

1000664867.english: I got out! Now's the time!

1000664868.english: Ugh... But it's not too late... Aeda, you saw that just now, right...?
1000664868.korean: 큿…… 하지만 늦지 않았어…… 에이다, 지금 거 봤겠지……

1000664870.english: Huh? That light... could it be Mr. Talonfeather?
1000664870.korean: 에? 저 빛은...... 설마 탈론페더 씨?

1000664875.english: Feder, what are you doing! You should be running away until the very end!
1000664875.korean: 페더, 뭐 하는 거야! 너는 끝까지 도망다녀야지!

1000664876.english: It's sending a signal by blinking the burner. It's Morse code......
1000664876.korean: 버너를 깜빡여서 신호를 보내고 있어. 모스 신호다......

1000664879.english: Mr. Talonfeather... isn't there any way to go rescue her?
1000664879.korean: 탈론페더 씨...... 어떻게 구하러 갈 수 없을까요?

1000664880.english: It’s not a distance where I can just leave the hyenas behind. That direction... If I had at least fallen outside the Iron Bug’s encirclement, there would be hope, but...
1000664880.korean: 하이에나를 내버려 두고 갈 수 있는 거리가 아니야. 저 방향...... 하다못해 철충의 포위망 밖으로 떨어졌다면 희망은 있지만......

1000664883.english: (There are few of them... they must be scouts, but if they keep going like that, the hyenas will spot them.)
1000664883.korean: (수가 적어...... 척후이겠지만, 저대로 가면 하이에나가 들켜.)

1000664884.english: (I have no choice but to clench my stomach and finish this. I have to end this quickly without giving them a chance to call for reinforcements. Are you ready?)
1000664884.korean: (배에 힘 꽉 주고 해치울 수밖에 없겠어. 증원을 부를 틈을 주지 않고, 빠르게 승부를 내야 해. 준비됐어?)

1000664887.english: It's okay, it's okay. It just brushed past a little.

1000664888.english: Wow, hand-to-hand combat. I really shouldn't try things I haven't done before. Looks like my luck has run out...
1000664888.korean: 이야~ 백병전이라니, 역시 안 해본 짓은 하는 게 아니야. 운빨도 다 떨어졌나 보네......

1000664889.english: Show me the wound! We need emergency treatment right now!
1000664889.korean: 상처를 보여주세요! 당장 응급 처치해야 돼요!

1000664890.english: More importantly, you eliminated all the enemies, right? Did anyone escape?
1000664890.korean: 것보다, 적은 전부 없앴지? 도망친 녀석은 없어?

1000664892.english: Then pick up that debris and move it somewhere else. As far away from our hideout as possible. It won't be very effective, but it's better than doing nothing.
1000664892.korean: 그럼 저 잔해를 들어서 다른 곳으로 옮겨 놔. 조금이라도 우리 은신처에서 멀리. 별 효과는 없겠지만 안 하는 것보단 나으니까.

1000664893.english: And, use all the remaining grenades to set up booby traps. As many as possible in at least one spot.
1000664893.korean: 그리고, 남은 수류탄 전부 써서 부비트랩을 깔아 놔. 한 곳이라도 많이.

1000664895.english: I can handle that myself. I'll go back to the hideout first, so I'll leave all the heavy lifting to you. Now, hurry up and go.
1000664895.korean: 그 정도는 직접 할 수 있어. 먼저 은신처에 돌아가 있을 테니까, 손 많이 가는 일은 전부 너에게 맡길게. 자, 서둘러 다녀와.

1000664899.english: ......Ow ow ow! Damn it, keeping my expression straight is fucking hard......

1000664900.english: Damn it, I guess I really used up all my luck...... I wonder if I'll really be able to make it back to where the hyenas are like this?
1000664900.korean: 젠장, 정말 운을 다 써버렸나 보네...... 이래서 정말 하이에나 있는 곳까지 돌아갈 수 있으려나?

1000664901.english: Well, I'll have to get back, even if I have to crawl. If I collapse on the way, Keshik will definitely get angry this time......
1000664901.korean: 뭐, 기어서라도 돌아가야지. 도중에 쓰러지기라도 하면 이번에야말로 케시크가 화낼 테니까......

1000664903.english: Commander, the satellite monitoring the area detected an unusual optical reaction. I believe it shone its laser targeting device toward my main body.
1000664903.korean: 사령관님, 해당 구역을 감시하던 위성이 특이한 광학 반응을 확인했습니다. 제 본체를 향해 레이저 조준장치를 비춘 것이라 생각됩니다.

1000664904.english: Based on the output and wavelength, the equipment is believed to belong to the E-16 Talonfeather.
1000664904.korean: 출력 및 파장에 의하면, 해당 장비는 E-16 탈론페더의 것이라 사료됩니다.

1000664905.english: The flickering pattern consists of binary coordinate information and a message. It is referred to as “Urgent, Support Requested.”
1000664905.korean: 명멸 패턴은 이진수화 된 좌표정보와 메시지. “긴급, 지원 바람”이라고 합니다.

1000664906.english: ......No. The response was lost immediately after transmission. It is presumed to have been shot down.
1000664906.korean: ......아니요. 발신 직후에 반응이 소실. 격추됐으리라 추측됩니다.

1000664907.english: Wait a minute! If it fell while Aeda was watching, you can tell the expected crash site, right?
1000664907.korean: 잠깐만! 에이다가 보는 중에 떨어졌다면 예상 추락 지점은 알 수 있지?

1000664908.english: Yes. Although the distress signal still cannot be detected, the landing point can be calculated in reverse using the final vector.
1000664908.korean: 네. 여전히 구난 신호는 잡아낼 수 없지만, 최종 벡터를 통해 낙착 지점은 역산할 수 있습니다.

1000664909.english: Then leave it to me! I'll fly right over. I'll fly over right now and make sure to bring you back safely!
1000664909.korean: 그렇다면 맡겨줘! 바로 날아갈게. 지금 바로 날아가서 반드시 무사히 데려올게!

1000664910.english: Wait. Talonfeather risked her life to signal her comrade's location. Are you just going to pretend you didn't see it?
1000664910.korean: 기다려. 탈론페더는 목숨을 걸고 동료의 위치를 알렸어. 그쪽은 못 본 척하게?

1000664911.english: That can't be right! We have to rescue both sides at the same time! Let's split the unit in two. It's a double operation!
1000664911.korean: 그럴 리가 없잖아! 양쪽 다 동시에 구하는 거야! 부대를 둘로 나누자. 이중 작전이야!

1000664912.english: ......That’s exactly what the enemy wanted. You know that, Commander, right?
1000664912.korean: ......그래서는 적이 바라던 바야, 알고 있겠지 사령관?

1000664913.english: - ......Leona was right. This time, the Iron Bug intend to use the besieged Horde unit as bait to lure our rescue force. Even if we disperse our troops, we will just keep becoming prey.
1000664913.korean: - ......레오나 말대로다. 이번에 철충들은 포위한 호드 부대를 미끼로 우리의 구조부대를 낚을 생각이다. 병력을 분산시켜 보내봤자 계속해서 먹이가 될 뿐이겠지.

1000664914.english: We can do it. Right, Commander?
1000664914.korean: 우리라면 해낼 수 있어. 그렇지, 사령관?

1000664915.english: - Sleipnir stares at me with a fiery gaze. I wanted to respond to that look, and the words were on the tip of my tongue, but I... am the commander. I must not let my emotions get the better of me.
1000664915.korean: - 슬레이프니르가 이글거리는 눈빛으로 나를 바라본다. 그 마음에 답하고 싶어 대답이 목 끝을 맴돌았지만, 나는... 사령관이다. 감정에 휘둘려서는 안 돼.

1000664917.english: - The signal Talonfeather desperately conveyed. Had she held back just one word, it would have given her a few milliseconds of delay. That might be why the evasive maneuver was delayed.
1000664917.korean: - 탈론페더가 필사적으로 전해준 신호. 단 한 마디만 아꼈어도 수 밀리초의 유예가 생겼을 거다. 그래서 회피 기동이 늦어졌을지도 모른다.

1000664918.english: - Nevertheless, she risked her life to send the message. That couldn't possibly be meaningless.
1000664918.korean: - 그런데도 그녀는 목숨을 걸고 메시지를 보냈다. 그게 무의미할리 없다.

1000664920.english: No, then you're saying I should just leave Khan alone!?
1000664920.korean: 아니, 그럼 칸은 내버려 두란 말이야!?

1000664921.english: No, I don't know the situation of the remaining Horde forces, but they might still have a chance to defend themselves. That is why I requested "support" rather than "rescue."
1000664921.korean: 아니, 남겨진 호드 부대의 상황은 알 수 없지만, 아직 스스로를 지킬 여지는 있을지도. 그래서 “구조”가 아니라 “지원”을 요청한 거야.

1000664922.english: Of course, seeing that it is an “emergency,” it must be a difficult situation. However, the crashed Talonfeather is completely isolated and helpless. For us, every second counts.
1000664922.korean: 물론 “긴급”이라는 걸 보면 힘든 상황이겠지. 하지만 추락한 탈론페더는 완전히 고립무원 상태야. 이쪽은 일각을 다투고 있어.

1000664923.english: ......Understood. I'll trust the Commander's judgment. But......

1000664924.english: Yeah, I thought so, so I've already gathered Andvari and Gremlin. We'll be able to leave right away.
1000664924.korean: 그래, 그럴 거라 생각해서 이미 안드바리와 그렘린을 소집해 놨어. 바로 출발할 수 있을 거야.

1000664925.english: So, from here on, it's a forced breakthrough, right?

1000664926.english: Talonfeather's message. Feather isn't so reckless as to leave those words just to cheer.
1000664926.korean: 탈론페더의 메시지. 페더가 단순히 응원하기 위해 그 말을 남길 정도로 대책 없진 않다.

1000664927.english: They must have contacted Orca through some means. In other words, our most urgent task is not conveying information.
1000664927.korean: 모종의 방법으로 오르카에 연락을 취했을 터다. 즉, 우리에게 가장 급한 과제는 정보 전달이 아니야.

1000664928.english: Is it disruption the top priority?

1000664929.english: Break through while causing disruption. While entrusting the Steel Line with eliminating the Iron Bug here, we need to check the key points on the land route.
1000664929.korean: 교란하며 돌파다. 스틸라인에게 이곳 철충 제거를 맡기면서, 육로의 중요 지점을 확인해볼 필요가 있어.

1000664930.english: To minimize the risk to the ground forces, you must return with confirmation that there is an escape route.
1000664930.korean: 육상부대의 리스크를 최소한으로 줄이기 위해, ‘빠져나갈 구멍이 있다’라는 확증을 가지고 돌아가 줘야지.

1000664931.english: Raging wildly without thinking... that's fine. Not bad.
1000664931.korean: 닥치는 대로 날뛰기라니 괜찮은걸. 나쁘지 않아.

1000664932.english: It really feels like a horde.

1000664933.english: No more sneaking around. Let's run, with all our might!
1000664933.korean: 살금살금 다니는 건 이제 끝이다. 달리자, 있는 힘껏!

1000664936.english: Still, the troop density is different. And we are definitely stirring that up right now.
1000664936.korean: 그래도 병력의 밀집도는 다르다. 그리고 우리는 지금 그걸 확실하게 휘젓는 중이지.

1000664937.english: The more they howl here, the higher the chances of survival for the hyena or the fallen feather will be.
1000664937.korean: 여기서 울부짖으면 짖을수록, 하이에나 쪽이나 추락한 페더의 생존확률이 오를 거다.

1000664938.english: Anyway, I'm starting to feel like focusing on just one of the two, either my voice or my legs.
1000664938.korean: 그건 그렇지만 슬슬 목청이든 다리든, 둘 중 하나에만 집중하고 싶어지네.

1000664939.english: agree. My knees are trembling a little... Hahaha, it feels like I just spent the whole night with the Commander.
1000664939.korean: 동감이야. 살짝 무릎이 후들거려서...... 아하하, 사령관이랑 밤새 하고 난 다음 같아.

1000664941.english: Boss, can the two of us do some 'entertainment' here?
1000664941.korean: 대장, 우리 둘이 여기서 ‘접대’ 좀 해도 될까?

1000664942.english: Alright, I'll leave it to you. As you know, but I hope—

1000664943.english: There is no need to tell me not to push myself. Going all out recklessly is the Anger of the Horde's way, isn't it? Talonfeather already did it, after all.
1000664943.korean: "무리하지 마라"는 말은 필요 없어. 무대포로 끝장을 보는 게 앵거 오브 호드의 방식이잖아? 탈론페더도 이미 저질렀으니까.

1000664944.english: You're the one trying to push yourself the hardest right now, Captain, aren't you? I'll give those words back to you.
1000664944.korean: 애초에 지금부터 제일 무리하려는 건 대장님이잖아요? 그 말 그대로 되돌려 드릴게요.

1000664946.english: Howl, sisters. Let the fury of the wolf pack be imprinted upon the enemies on all sides.
1000664946.korean: 울부짖어라, 자매들이여. 사방의 적들에게 늑대 무리의 분노를 새겨주도록.

1000664949.english: Sorry for making you stay with me.

1000664950.english: No, my legs were really trembling. It's right for the captain to break through this part alone.
1000664950.korean: 아니야, 다리가 후들거리던 건 진짜였으니까. 이 앞은 대장 혼자 돌파하는 게 맞아.

1000664951.english: Ah, no matter how much I want to catch up, I can't match that speed...
1000664951.korean: 아~아, 아무리 따라잡고 싶어도 저 속도는 흉내 못 내겠어......

1000664952.english: I'm sure she'll pull it off with a straight face again this time.
1000664952.korean: 이번에도 분명 아무렇지 않은 얼굴로 해내고 말겠지.

1000664953.english: I may not be able to mimic it, but I can provide cover. Let's take out at least one more of the guys following behind here.
1000664953.korean: 흉내 낼 수는 없어도 엄호는 할 수 있지. 뒤에 붙는 놈을 여기서 하나라도 더 없애자.

1000664954.english: ......Speak of the devil and she appears. How about you, Zantan?
1000664954.korean: ......호랑이도 제말 하면 온다더니. 너 잔탄은 어때?

1000664955.english: Well, it’s enough to spend everything I can on the hope that reinforcements are coming.
1000664955.korean: 증원이 온다에 걸고 죄다 써댈 만큼은 뭐, 충분해.

1000664956.english: Okay. That's the only thing we can bet on. Let's go all-in.
1000664956.korean: 오케이. 우리가 걸만한 건 것밖에 없으니까. 올인해버리자고.

1000664957.english: The booby traps... that's all. Now, let's go back to where the two of you are.
1000664957.korean: 부비트랩은...... 이걸로 다 됐어. 자, 두 분이 있는 곳으로 돌아가자.

1000664959.english: (Go there... what do you intend to do? Me protecting those people? That’s ridiculous. I can’t do anything. I’m just holding my comrades back.)
1000664959.korean: (가서...... 어떡하려고? 내가 그 사람들을 지켜? 웃기는 얘기지. 나는 아무것도 못해. 동료 발목만 잡을 뿐)

1000664960.english: (Ah, if only I hadn't been restored, would everything have worked out better...)
1000664960.korean: (아아, 차라리 내가 복원되지 않았다면, 모든 게 더 잘 풀렸을까......)

1000664961.english: ......Huh? There's something here. Debris...... It's not an Iron Bug...... A container?
1000664961.korean: ......어라? 뭐가 있네. 잔해...... 철충이 아니야...... 컨테이너?

1000664962.english: This is the container-type drone I saw in the Orca hangar. They forcibly added boosters to it.
1000664962.korean: 이거, 오르카 격납고에서 봤던 컨테이너형 드론이야. 거기다 억지로 부스터를 추가해서 달아놨어.

1000664963.english: ......There's one lying over there, too. It's not just one, is it? Did they send several of them flying around here?
1000664963.korean: ......저쪽에도 떨어져 있네. 하나가 아니잖아? 이 근처로 몇 개씩이나 날려 보낸 건가?

1000664964.english: Let's see, the unlock key is the Orca standard code...... Huh? There's video data attached?
1000664964.korean: 개봉 키는 어디 보자, 오르카 표준 코드로...... 어라? 동영상 데이터가 첨부돼있네?

1000664965.english: Anger of the Horde, excuse me for the recorded video. I am Andvari.
1000664965.korean: 앵거 오브 호드 여러분, 녹화 영상으로 실례하겠습니다. 안드바리입니다.

1000664966.english: Now that I have located your current position, I will send supplies first. Ammunition, medical supplies, and your dedicated reserve weaponry. And......
1000664966.korean: 여러분의 현재 위치를 파악했기에 우선 물자를 보내겠습니다. 탄약과 의약품, 그리고 여러분의 예비 전용 무장. 그리고......

1000664967.english: I'm Gremlin~ I've disassembled our Topdori into modules and included them. I've programmed it to operate autonomously in sentry mode, so once you assemble it, it will immediately run around ensuring the safety of the surroundings!
1000664967.korean: 그렘린입니다~ 우리 탑돌이를 모듈로 분해해서 동봉해 놨어요. 보초 모드로 자율 가동되도록 프로그램해 놨으니, 조립하면 바로 주변 안전 확보를 위해 뛰어다녀줄 거예요!

1000664968.english: It's just that I modified it to prioritize speed so the container wouldn't get shot down by Iron Bugs while flying, so I can't guarantee the contents will be safe~
1000664968.korean: 단지 좀, 컨테이너가 날아가는 길에 철충에게 격추되지 않도록 속도 우선으로 개조해버려서 내용물이 무사할지는 장담할 수 없어요~

1000664969.english: will increase the number accordingly and send them out. Please retrieve as many as possible, select the undamaged parts, and assemble them.
1000664969.korean: 그만큼 수를 늘려서 날려 보내겠습니다. 하나라도 많이 회수해서, 망가지지 않은 부품을 골라 조립해주세요.

1000664970.english: Andvari, who is always thrifty, is on the verge of tears thanks to the massive warehouse clearance! Horde will have to go into frugal mode for a while when they return~
1000664970.korean: 언제나 절약하는 안드바리가 창고 대방출 덕에 눈물을 글썽이고 있어요! 호드는 돌아오면 얼마간은 절약모드로 지내야겠네요~

1000664971.english: Anyway, please come back! All of us together! We will do anything to make that happen!
1000664971.korean: 어쨌든 돌아와 주세요! 모두 다 같이! 그러기 위해서라면 뭐든지 하겠습니다!

1000664972.english: The older sisters are currently desperately racking their brains over how to rescue you. We will definitely go! Until then, please endure with the supplies we sent. We beg of you!
1000664972.korean: 지금 언니들이 구조할 방법을 필사적으로 고민 중이예요. 반드시 가겠습니다! 그때까지 부디 보낸 물자로 견뎌주세요. 부탁드립니다!

1000664974.english: I see. The words Mr. Talonfeather told me... 'You are not alone'... were really true...
1000664974.korean: 그렇구나. 탈론페더 씨가 전해준...... ‘혼자가 아니야’라는 말은...... 정말이었어......

1000664975.english: "All of us together," I mean... Even someone as useless as me... told me to come back...
1000664975.korean: 모두 다 같이, 라니...... 이런 도움 안 되는 나조차도...... 돌아오라고 말해줬어......

1000664976.english: ......Alright, first, let's gather the containers and assemble as many Tower-turners as possible...... Then, let's take the weapons and medicine to Hyena and Salamander. If it's just that much, I can do it!
1000664976.korean: ......그래, 우선 컨테이너를 모아서 하나라도 많이 탑돌이 씨를 조립하고...... 그 다음 무기와 약을 하이에나 씨와 샐러맨더 씨에게 가져가자. 그 정도라면, 나도 할 수 있어!

1000664979.english: Situation over. The enemy has been annihilated.

1000664981.english: ......Right, I see I still have 40% left. That's good...... Well, though, I seem to be closer to 60%......
1000664981.korean: ......그래, 4할이나 남았나. 잘됐군...... 뭐, 나는 6할 쪽인 모양이지만......

1000664983.english: Sergeant Kheshig, by virtue of the unit commander's authority, appoints you as Second Lieutenant and transfers command.
1000664983.korean: 케시크 상사, 부대장 권한으로 귀관을 소위로 임명하고 지휘권을 이양한다.

1000664984.english: I have been appointed. Now, let's go back together.

1000664985.english: Don't be unreasonable...... Look at this, half of my abdomen is gone...... Please take care of everyone remaining......
1000664985.korean: 억지 부리지 마...... 이거 봐, 복부 절반이 사라졌어...... 남은 모두를...... 부탁해.

1000664986.english: You too. I will never leave you behind.

1000664987.english: ......Hey Kheshig, do you believe in reincarnation? That dead people become plants or insects, and someday are reborn as humans......
1000664987.korean: ......있지 케시크, 윤회란 거 믿어? 죽은 사람이 화초나 벌레가 돼서, 언젠가 다시 인간으로 태어난다는......

1000664988.english: Will I be able to reincarnate? Will I be able to become human next time...? I've always longed for it. Dressing up like a human girl, eating sweets, chatting with friends...
1000664988.korean: 나는 윤회할 수 있을까? 다음에는 인간이 될 수 있을까...... 줄곧 동경해왔거든. 인간 여자아이처럼 꾸미고, 달콤한 걸 먹고, 친구와 떠들고......

1000664989.english: ......Or maybe it won't work? Unlike plants or insects, we aren't lives created by God...... Even if we are born again, will we remain mere tools......
1000664989.korean: ......아니면 안 되려나? 우리는 화초나 벌레와 다르게 신이 만든 생명이 아니니까...... 다음에 다시 태어나도, 계속 도구인 채일까......

1000664990.english: You are enough just by being who you are now. That alone has saved me. You have always watched over me.
1000664990.korean: 당신은, 지금의 당신인 것만으로도 충분해요. 그것만으로도 저는 구원받았습니다. 계속 지켜 주셨잖아요.

1000664991.english: So please... open your eyes. Don't leave me alone... Commanding is too much for me... I might cause everyone's deaths... Please!
1000664991.korean: 그러니 부디...... 눈을 떠 주세요. 저를 혼자 두지 마세요...... 지휘라니 무리예요...... 제가 모두를 죽게 만들지도 몰라요...... 제발!

1000664993.english: - We are creatures of humans, not gods. Therefore, we are outside of God's jurisdiction. Or would the omnipotent God listen even to the prayers of us, who are merely tools?
1000664993.korean: - 우리는, 신이 아닌 인간의 피조물. 그렇기에 신의 관할 밖에 있다.&n   아니면 전지전능한 신께서는, 그저 도구에 불과한 우리의 기도조차도 들어 주실까?

1000664994.english: - If one day her prayer is answered and the day comes when she can become human—&n   I pray to you, O God. I do not ask for anything so undeserved.
1000664994.korean: - 언젠가 그녀의 기도가 이뤄져서, 인간이 될 수 있는 날이 온다면-&n   청하옵니다, 신이시여. 저는 그 정도로 과분한 것은 바라지 않습니다.

1000664995.english: - In my next life, let me be born as a wolf. Grant me teeth and claws so that I may never abandon my pack comrades and protect them until the very end.
1000664995.korean: - 다음 생에서는 저를 늑대로 태어나게 하소서.&n   무리의 동료를 결코 버리지 않고 마지막까지 지켜낼 수 있는, 이빨과 발톱을 내리소서.

1000664996.english: - When that time comes, I will run across the whole earth and praise you with the blood of my prey.
1000664996.korean: - 그 때가 오거든 온 대지를 뛰어다니며 사냥감의 피로 당신을 찬양하겠습니다.

1000664997.english: - Please. Please, do not kill anyone before me anymore...... In the next life, please take me first. I...... can't bear it any longer......
1000664997.korean: - 제발. 이젠 누구도, 저보다 먼저 죽이지 말아주세요......&n   다음 생에서야말로 저를 가장 먼저 데려가 주세요. 더는...... 견딜 수 없습니다......

1000665000.english: - Ah, is it a dream again?

1000665001.english: - If I exclude things like conversation with others, consideration for subordinates, and planning long-term strategies, and instead immerse myself in the simple task of defeating the enemy right in front of me, half of my total thinking ability is sufficient concentration.
1000665001.korean: - 다른 사람과의 대화나 부하에 대한 배려, 장기적인 전략 구상 같은 것들을 배제하고 단지 눈앞의 적을 쓰러트린다는 단순 작업에 몰두할 경우, 내가 필요로 하는 집중력은 모든 사고력 중 절반이면 충분하다.

1000665002.english: - Therefore, in solo missions where extreme conditions persist, I can alternate between combat and rest by switching between my two divided consciousnesses.
1000665002.korean: - 그렇기에 극한상황이 계속되는 단독임무에서는, 나는 두 개로 나눈 의식을 교대로 바꿔가며 전투와 휴식을 병행할 수 있다.

1000665003.english: - To put it simply... I can fight even while sleeping. It is not an ability I possessed from birth. It is a skill that naturally became ingrained in my body after fighting for 100 years.
1000665003.korean: - 알기 쉽게 말하자면... 자면서도 싸울 수 있다. 원래부터 갖고 있던 능력은 아니다. 100년을 싸워오며 저절로 몸에 배어버린 기술이다.

1000665004.english: - The good thing is that it drastically reduces mental fatigue. The bad thing is that you dream.
1000665004.korean: - 좋은 점은, 정신적 피로를 대폭 경감시키는 것. 나쁜 점은, 꿈을 꾸는 거다.

1000665005.english: - Generally, having memories replayed is not a very pleasant experience. Especially if you fall asleep in such an unnatural, stressful situation, your dreams are bound to turn into nightmares.
1000665005.korean: - 대체로 기억이 재현되는 건 썩 유쾌한 일은 아니다. 특히 이런 부자연스러운 스트레스 상황에서 잠들면 꿈은 악몽으로 치우치기 마련이다.

1000665006.english: - The awake half simply watches silently as the other half suffers sleep paralysis in a nightmare, covered in the heat of gunpowder smoke and bullets graze their skin.
1000665006.korean: - 그렇게 악몽에 가위눌리는 반쪽을, 각성해 있는 반쪽이 그저 묵묵히 바라본다. 피부를 스치는 총탄과 화약 연기의 열기를 뒤집어써 가며.

1000665007.english: - I know it’s not normal. Fortunately, my subordinates don’t know. I only do [this] when no one is watching.
1000665007.korean: - 정상이 아니라는 건 알고 있다. 다행히도 부하들은 모른다. [이것]을 하는 건 아무도 보지 않을 때뿐이다.

1000665008.english: - I don’t want everyone to be even more afraid of me than they already are. If possible, I’d like to keep this from the commander, who’s monitoring the battle... but if he ever catches on, all I can do is hope he doesn’t think I’ve “broken down.”
1000665008.korean: - 모두가 지금 이상으로 나를 겁내게 되는 건 싫다. 가능하면 싸움을 모니터링 하고 있을 사령관에게도 숨기고 싶지만...... 언젠가 눈치채는 날에는, 사령관이 나를 [고장났다]고 생각하지 않기를 바랄 수밖에.

1000665009.english: Anyway, that was an unpleasant dream.

1000665010.english: - As she reloads the empty magazine, she grumbles about the daydream playing out in her mind. The fact that a memory this old has resurfaced... is it because I saw her, after all?
1000665010.korean: - 텅 빈 탄창을 재장전하며, 동시 진행 중인 백일몽에 불평을 내뱉는다. 이 정도로 오래된 기억이 다시 끄집어져 나온 건... 역시 그녀를 봐 버린 탓일까.

1000665011.english: - I was honestly relieved to hear that my pre-modification self had been lost along with my genetic information.
1000665011.korean: - 개조 받기 이전의 자신이 유전자 정보째로 유실됐다고 하는 것에, 솔직히 안도했다.

1000665012.english: - I was refuted by the Doctor, but it was my selfishness that I opposed Kheshig's restoration. Did Marina and my other colleagues feel this same sense of unease when they met the restored sister?
1000665012.korean: - 닥터에게는 논파 당하고 말았지만, 케시크의 복원을 반대한 건 나의 이기심이었다. 마리나 다른 동료도 복원된 자매를 대면했을 때 이런 위화감을 느꼈던 걸까.

1000665013.english: - To the me of those days, the me of today has no face to show.
